hook: A fuller life makes attraction easier because it removes the pressure to extract too much from one person too fast.
body: When your week already has meaning, friendship, movement, and momentum, dating stops carrying your whole emotional economy.

hook: Men with thin lives often lean too hard on romantic possibility because there is not enough else feeding them.
body: Build a life that supports dating instead of using dating to compensate for a life that feels empty.

hook: Build a life that supports dating instead of using dating to compensate for a life that feels empty.
body: Someone who has friends, routines, and interests tends to show up less grasping and more present on dates.

body: Strengthen one non-dating part of your life that would make you less likely to overattach early.
